What We Make

Our Products

All products manufactured with high-strength cement concrete, precision-tested for load capacity, durability, and compliance with IS standards.

01

RCC Spun Pipes

Centrifugally cast reinforced concrete pipes for drainage, sewerage, irrigation, and culvert applications. High strength, smooth bore, and long service life.

  • Available in multiple diameters
  • IS 458 compliant
  • Suitable for heavy load applications
Common Sizes
Dia (mm) Class Length (m)
300NP2 / NP32.5 / 3.0
400NP2 / NP32.5 / 3.0
500NP2 / NP32.5 / 3.0
600+NP3 / NP42.5 / 3.0
02

Manhole Covers

Heavy-duty RCC manhole covers for roads, footpaths, and utility access points. Designed to withstand heavy vehicular traffic and harsh weather conditions.

  • High compressive strength
  • Anti-skid surface finish
  • Custom sizes available
Standard Dimensions
Type L×W×H (mm)
Straight1000×300×200
Kerb1000×250×300
CustomAs required
04

Block Tiles

High-strength concrete block tiles for pavements, walkways, driveways, and outdoor flooring. Durable, slip-resistant, and available in multiple shapes and finishes.

  • Multiple shapes & finishes
  • High load-bearing capacity
  • Suitable for outdoor & heavy-use areas
Common Sizes
Size (mm) Load Class
450 × 450Light Duty
600 × 600Medium Duty
CustomHeavy Duty
03

Curb Stone

Precast RCC kerb stones for road edges, footpaths, and boundary delineation. Precise dimensions, uniform finish, and excellent durability for urban infrastructure.

  • Standard & custom profiles
  • Weather and wear resistant
  • Easy installation

From Our Factory

Our Work, Up Close

Real products from our manufacturing yard at Village Chang, Palhawas — what you see is what you get.

Precision-Stacked RCC Spun Pipes
Each pipe is centrifugally cast for a smooth, uniform bore — ensuring consistent flow and long-term structural strength. Ready for dispatch from our factory yard.
Multiple Diameter Pipes
We manufacture RCC spun pipes in a wide range of diameters to suit drainage, sewerage, and irrigation requirements.
Large Inventory, Ready to Ship
Our yard maintains a substantial stock of finished pipes, enabling fast turnaround for large project requirements without delays.
Our Manufacturing Unit
Our production facility at Village Chang, Palhawas, Rewari — where every pipe is cast, cured, and quality-checked before leaving the yard.

Who We Are

Built on Two Decades of Trust

RONAK ENTERPRISES was founded in 2005 in Rewari, Haryana, with a singular vision: to manufacture high-quality concrete infrastructure products that last a lifetime. From drainage systems to road infrastructure, our products have become a trusted choice for contractors, municipal bodies, and government projects across the region.

Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility at Village Chang, Palhawas, is equipped to handle large-scale orders with consistent quality and timely delivery.

SS
SHYAM SUNDER
Proprietor · RONAK ENTERPRISES
